package rulefixtures

// scenario for go_perf_layer_resource_pooling_buffer_pool_without_max_capacity: Layer: Resource pooling. Flag buffer pools that return arbitrarily large buffers and retain memory after spikes.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: performance; severity: contextual.
type Rule579NegativeRecord struct {
	ID int
	Name string
	Values []string
}

func scenario579Negative(records []Rule579NegativeRecord) int {
	total := 0
	for _, record := range records {
		total += record.ID + len(record.Values)
	}
	return total
}
